zh.Sandy, Bedfordshire, England: 英國英格蘭貝德福爾桑迪
zh.King's Langley, Hertfordshire, England: 英國賀特福爾金也斯 明日香

zh.lifeSummary: 當Ann Denison於1552年出生在英國賀特福爾金也斯 明日香時，她的父親John Denison18歲，母親Agnes Wiley18歲。她於大約1572年與Thomas Langley在英國貝德福爾桑迪結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1595年7月29日在英國貝德福爾桑迪享年43歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭貝德福爾桑迪。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ann Denison于1552年出生在英国賀特福爾金也斯 明日香时，她的父亲John Denison18岁，母亲Agnes Wiley18岁。她于大约1572年与Thomas Langley在英国貝德福爾桑迪结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1595年7月29日在英国貝德福爾桑迪享年43岁，埋葬在英国英格兰貝德福爾桑迪。

nameMeanings.name: Denison
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of a Slavic patronymic from the personal name Denis or Denys , such as Russian Denisov or Ukrainian Denysenko or Denysevych.

variants.name: Dennison
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Denis (see Dennis ) + -son. Compare Tennyson .
English (of Norman origin): from Anglo-Norman French deinzein, a burgess who enjoyed the privileges of those living deinz la cité ‘within the city’.

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Ann Denison was born in 1552, in King's Langley, Hertfordshire, England, her father, John Denison, was 18 and her mother, Agnes Wiley, was 18. She married Thomas Langley about 1572, in Sandy, Bedfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 29 July 1595, in Sandy, Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 43, and was buried in Sandy, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ann Denison est née en 1552, à King's Langley, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Denison, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Agnes Wiley, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Langley environ 1572, à Sandy, Bedfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 29 juillet 1595, à Sandy, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterrée à Sandy, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ann Denison 1552 in King's Langley, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Denison 18 und ihre Mutter Agnes Wiley 18. Sie hat um 1572 in Sandy, Bedfordshire, England Thomas Langley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 29. Juli 1595 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Sandy, Bedfordshire, England und wurde in Sandy, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ann Denison è nata il nel 1552 nel King's Langley, Hertfordshire, England, sua padre, John Denison, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Agnes Wiley, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Langley circa 1572, nel Sandy, Bedfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 29 luglio 1595, nel Sandy, Bedfordshire, England, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolta a Sandy, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ann Denisonが1552年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアキング'ス ラングリーで生まれた時，父John Denisonは18歳，母Agnes Wileyは18歳であった。約1572年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアサンディでThomas Langleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1595年7月29日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアサンディで43歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアサンディにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ann Denison(이)가 1552년 영국 허트퍼드실르 킨그'스 랭글리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Denison(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Wiley(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 대략 1572년 영국 베드퍼드실르 샌디에서 Thomas Langley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1595년 7월 29일 영국 베드퍼드실르 샌디에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 샌디에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ann Denison nasceu em 1552, em King's Langley, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Denison, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Wiley, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Langley aproximadamente 1572, em Sandy, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 29 de julho de 1595, em Sandy, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, com 43 anos, e foi sepultada em Sandy, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ann Denison родилась в 1552 г. в местности кинг'с лангли, хиртфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Denison было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Wiley, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Langley около 1572 г. в местности сэнди, бедфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 29 июля 1595 г. в местности сэнди, бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 43 лет и была похоронена в местности сэнди, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ann Denison nació en 1552, en King's Langley, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Denison, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Agnes Wiley, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Thomas Langley aproximadamente 1572, en Sandy, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 29 de julio de 1595, en Sandy, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultada en Sandy, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
